statement.en: Erdős–Rado sunflower conjecture: Does there exist a constant c_k such that f(n,k) < c_k^n for all n > 0, where f(n,k) is minimal such that every family of n-uniform sets with at least f(n,k) sets contains a k-sunflower?
statement.ja: Erdős–Rado の向日葵予想: 任意の k に対し c_k > 0 が存在して、n-uniform な集合族のサイズが f(n,k) 以上なら k-向日葵を含む、と言えるか？
statement.latex: f(n,k) < c_k^n \text{ for some constant } c_k > 0, \text{ for all } n > 0

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Π₂ existence statement over ℕ; classical infinite-search structure with bridging to entropy/polynomial methods
reiTyping.rationale: 型=I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE (c_k 存在 ∀ n), 副=VI_BRIDGING (組合せ × 情報理論); 形式化=scaffold (実 sorry=2 in ErdosProblems/20.lean)

external: Alweiss-Lovett-Wu-Zhang 2021: f(n,k) ≤ (log n)^n k^O(n) (polynomial-log bound, near-resolution)

formalization.notes: Namespaces: Erdos20. wiki-facing stub は import only. 実 formalization は ErdosProblems/20.lean (86 行, IsSunflowerWithKernel + IsSunflower 定義 + 4 helper proved theorems + erdos_20 main open with 2 sorry)

known_progress.event: Erdős-Rado original statement + f(n,k) ≤ (k-1)^n · n! 上界
Alweiss-Lovett-Wu-Zhang: f(n,k) ≤ (log n)^n · k^O(n) (quasi-polynomial in n, major breakthrough)
known_progress.impact: 予想の near-resolution. 定数 c_k の存在は未確定だが多項式オーダー確定

reiAssessment.approachSuggestion: Alweiss et al. 2021 の entropy argument を Lean 4 に移植 → upper bound lemma を証明 → 残る c_k の constant factor に D-FUMT₈ FLOWING 値化で到達圏を検証
reiAssessment.solveRationale: Familiar=False, primaryType=I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE, dfumt8=NEITHER/BOTH, formalization=scaffold (2 sorry); 2021 breakthrough 以降 tractable 増
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: 2 sorry + ALW sustained bound の Lean 移植が核
